L1_headline: SEM – Executive Chairman submits take-private proposal. | 11/24/25
L2_brief: Select Medical disclosed a non-binding indication of interest from Executive Chairman Robert Ortenzio to take the company private, submitted to the Board on November 24, 2025. The proposal was filed via Schedule 13D by Ortenzio, the Estate of Rocco A. Ortenzio, and Mr. Jackson as a group. This represents an early-stage potential transaction with no binding agreement or definitive terms disclosed.

L3_detailed.event: Executive Chairman Robert A. Ortenzio submitted a non-binding indication of interest to the Board of Directors to take Select Medical Holdings Corporation private
key_figures: No price or valuation disclosed in 8-K
L3_detailed.deal_implications: Very early stage - non-binding indication of interest only; Board will need to evaluate proposal; no certainty of transaction occurring; potential for competing bids or Board rejection
remaining_conditions: Board evaluation and response to proposal
Negotiation of definitive terms and price
risks_flagged: Non-binding nature of proposal creates significant uncertainty
Insider/management-led buyout may raise conflicts of interest and special committee requirements
